common-mode-choke.title: Common Mode Choke Series
common-mode-choke.description: Common mode chokes for EMI suppression, industrial power supplies, communication equipment and electronic noise filtering. ElexNova supplies magnetic components manufactured by MiDEN Electronics for stable differential and common mode noise control in demanding B2B applications.

common-mode-chokes.title: Common Mode Choke Series
common-mode-chokes.description: Common mode choke components for reducing electromagnetic interference in power conversion, communication systems, industrial electronics and custom assemblies. MiDEN Electronics supports OEM projects with product review, sample discussion and RFQ service.

custom-magnetic-components.title: Custom Magnetic Components
custom-magnetic-components.description: Custom magnetic components for OEM power modules, industrial equipment, EV charging systems, LED drivers and special electronic assemblies. MiDEN Electronics supports drawing review, sample matching, winding structure discussion and RFQ preparation.

drum-core-inductors.title: Drum Core Inductor Series
drum-core-inductors.description: Drum core inductors for power electronics, DC-DC converters, filtering circuits and industrial control applications. These magnetic components are suitable for projects requiring stable inductance, current capacity and practical through-hole or radial mounting formats.

flat-wire-inductor.title: Flat Wire Inductor Series
flat-wire-inductor.description: Flat wire inductors for high current power conversion, EV chargers, renewable energy systems and industrial electronics. The flat winding structure supports low resistance, improved thermal behavior and compact magnetic component design.

magnet-ring-inductor.title: Magnet Ring Inductor Series
magnet-ring-inductor.description: Magnet ring inductors for power supply filtering, energy conversion, industrial equipment and custom magnetic applications. ElexNova presents MiDEN Electronics product images for sourcing teams that need reliable toroidal-style magnetic components.

planar-transformer.title: Planar Transformer Series
planar-transformer.description: Planar transformers for high frequency power conversion, compact power modules, industrial electronics and advanced energy systems. These transformer products support low profile mechanical design and efficient magnetic performance.

power-inductor.title: Power Inductor Series
power-inductor.description: High current power inductors for industrial power supplies, renewable energy systems, EV chargers, DC-DC converters and electronic control equipment. ElexNova provides product galleries manufactured by MiDEN Electronics for B2B magnetic component sourcing.

smd-inductor.title: SMD Inductor Series
smd-inductor.description: SMD inductors for compact PCB layouts, EMI filtering, DC-DC converters and electronic control circuits. MiDEN Electronics supports industrial buyers with product image review, RFQ communication and application-based component selection.

smd-inductors.title: SMD Inductor Series
smd-inductors.description: Surface mount inductors for compact PCB applications, power regulation, signal filtering and industrial electronic assemblies. These products support efficient board-level magnetic component sourcing.

toroidal-inductors.title: Toroidal Inductor Series
toroidal-inductors.description: Toroidal inductors for power conversion, EMI filtering, renewable energy systems and industrial control applications. The ring core structure supports efficient magnetic flux distribution and robust electrical performance.

transformers.title: Transformer Series
transformers.description: Transformers for power supplies, industrial electronics, energy systems and custom magnetic applications. MiDEN Electronics supports transformer sourcing with product galleries, application discussion and RFQ service.
